title: Liquid Staking on Hyperliquid with Valantis - stHYPE & HyENA
summary_title: Stake Type's multi-account design unlocks HIP-3 markets, faster withdrawals, and institutional staking
summary_description: Valantis' Ollie explains how ST Hype captured staking yield that no other LST can, and why Athena partnership changes everything.

key_moments.label: AI-generated Valantis anthem surprises the space
Valantis pivoted to Hyperliquid because it's the only chain with proven DeFi product-market fit
ST Hype points launch was intentionally delayed nine months until product could scale billions
Hype utilities: 500K for hip-3, 200K for quote assets, 1M for limit orders, 400K for max market-making discounts
Multi-account architecture lets ST Hype offer faster withdrawals and partner yields that single-account LSTs can't
Athena partnership brings 12% APY on USDE, contractual 20K hype/year to ST Hype holders
Looping ST Hype 4-5x via Hyperland borrow is highest-yield points farming strategy
Hype trades like fundamental asset, could flip Ethereum if economic maturity trend continues

pull_quote: Points are just a megaphone on what you're already doing. If the fire itself has no substance, they won't get you anywhere.
